upload.title: Upload Video
upload.subtitle: Upload a video and create a processing task.
upload.acceptedFormats: Accepted: mp4 / mkv / avi / mov (final validation is done by ffprobe).

task.subtitle: This page polls the backend for task progress. Polling is managed by the store and stops on terminal status.
task.searchPlaceholder: Search by task ID or filename...
task.notes: Notes: filenames are recorded at upload time. If this backend was upgraded, older tasks may show only the task ID.
task.recentSubtitle: Last 20 tasks recorded by the backend.
task.noRecentDescription: No tasks have been recorded yet. Upload a video to create a task.

editor.title: Subtitle editor
editor.subtitle: Edit subtitle files (ASS/SRT). Editing only updates the subtitle file; it does not rebuild or burn the final video.
editor.panelHelp: Editing here only updates the subtitle file (ASS/SRT). It does not rebuild or burn the final video automatically.
editor.notReadyDescription: The task has not completed yet, so subtitle files are not available. Go back to the task status page and wait for SUCCESS.
editor.emptyDescription: This task does not have any downloadable subtitle files in the results manifest.
editor.unsavedLeave: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and leave this page?
editor.unsavedLanguage: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and switch language?
editor.unsavedFormat: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and switch format?

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.subtitle: Download existing outputs. Rebuilding final.mp4 is explicit and only runs when you click the button.
downloads.languageHelp: Subtitle downloads require an explicit lang + format. The selector above controls which language is used.
downloads.noManifestDescription: The results manifest is not available yet. Check task status first.
downloads.notReadyDescription: The task has not completed yet, so downloads are not available. Go back to the status page and wait for SUCCESS.
downloads.finalVideoMissingBody: This can happen if the task did not generate a final video, or if a subtitle was edited and the backend deleted final.mp4 to avoid serving an outdated video.
downloads.noAutoRebuild: Editing subtitles only updates the subtitle file; it does not rebuild or burn the final video automatically.
downloads.rebuildHelp: This enqueues a background rebuild using the selected language. Track progress on the status page.
downloads.finalVideoDescription: Download the final video if it exists.
